projectDescription: A location-based mobile experience platform that aggregates local news, travel, entertainment, and business content for any location worldwide.
keyFeatures: Location-based content discovery showing 200 closest websites for any location worldwide
Aggregates multimedia from YouTube, Google, TripAdvisor, Yelp, Airbnb, and 100+ platforms
Local business map search by category, name, keyword, or brand (500,000+ listings)
In-app purchasing with location-relevant products, hotels, tickets, and experiences
BizDetails landing pages for member businesses with LIVE customer support
Proximity-triggered loyalty programs for local businesses
Email campaigns to nearby interested users
